info.description: A CRUD server for analyzing financial portfolios comprising stocks, bonds, and ETFs.
info.title: Portfolio API

get.description: Fetches end-of-day prices for all US securities from EODHD and stores them in the price cache. Always targets the US exchange — EODHD bulk fetch is only cost-effective for US equities.
get.summary: Bulk fetch EODHD end-of-day prices for the US exchange

parameters.description: Date to fetch (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to last market close)
parameters.name: date

parameters.description: Minimum matched prices required to accept the response (default 30000); pass 0 to bypass
parameters.name: min_required

get.description: Dump price data as CSV with ticker and exchange columns instead of security_id. Optional filters: ticker, start_date, end_date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Fetch daily price data for a security by ticker or ID
get.summary: Get daily prices for a security

get.description: Fetch holdings for an ETF or mutual fund by ticker or ID

post.description: Parse a CSV (ticker,exchange,date,open,high,low,close,volume) and upsert into fact_price. Resolves (ticker,exchange) to security_id. Pass dry_run=true to validate without writing.

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to validate without writing
parameters.name: dry_run

post.description: Parse a CSV (Symbol,Company,Weight) and persist holdings for an ETF or mutual fund. Bypasses the postgres check: persists it always
post.summary: Load ETF holdings from a CSV upload

post.description: Selects up to `count` securities in priority order and fetches fundamentals
post.summary: Backfill fundamentals data for multiple securities (async)

post.description: Parse a CSV (ticker,name,exchange,type[,currency,isin,country]) and bulk-insert securities into dim_security. Pass dry_run=true to validate and preview without writing. Also updates ISIN on existing securities when the CSV provides one.
post.summary: Load securities from a CSV upload

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to validate without writing (returns new_exchanges and row counts)
parameters.name: dry_run

post.description: Parse a CSV (Ticker, Name, Exchange, IPO date) and update dim_security.inception for matching US securities.
post.summary: Load IPO dates from a CSV upload

parameters.description: CSV file (Ticker, Name, Exchange, IPO date)
parameters.name: file

post.description: Fetch all exchange symbol lists from EODHD and sync them into dim_security. Pass type=dryrun to simulate without writes.

parameters.description: Run mode: omit for live sync, 'dryrun' or 'dry_run' for simulation
parameters.name: type

get.description: Returns users with is_approved=false, ordered by registration date. Requires ADMIN role.

patch.description: Sets is_approved=true for the given user ID, allowing them to log in. Requires ADMIN role.

post.description: Verifies credentials and returns a Bearer token. The account must be approved before login is permitted.

get.description: Returns the UserDTO for the user identified by the Bearer token.

post.description: Creates an unapproved user account. The user cannot log in until an admin approves them.

get.description: Returns the complete license text for all open source dependencies used by this service.

post.description: Create a new portfolio with optional memberships. Accepts JSON or multipart/form-data with a CSV file.
Compare two portfolios over a time period, showing membership differences and performance metrics

get.description: Retrieve a portfolio and its memberships by ID

put.description: Update a portfolio's name and/or memberships. Accepts JSON or multipart/form-data with a CSV file.

get.summary: List pinned portfolios with key metrics

parameters.description: Pre-IPO gap strategy: empty (constrain start date), cash_flat, cash_appreciating, or reallocate
parameters.name: missing_data_strategy

post.summary: Pin a portfolio to the user's glance list

delete.summary: Unpin a portfolio from the user's glance list

get.description: Get all portfolios belonging to a user

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the date the portfolio began trading or was built.
Reflects when the strategy was initiated, not when it was imported into this system.
Accepts "YYYY-MM-DD" or RFC3339. Defaults to the current timestamp if omitted.

snapshotted_at.description:
SnapshottedAt records when the membership share counts were entered into this system.
Used to reverse stock splits that occurred between created_at and this date,
so historical performance is computed with correct pre-split share counts.

allocation.description: Proportion of this security's allocation from this source (sums to 1.0)

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the date the portfolio began trading or was built.
Reflects when the strategy was initiated, not when it was imported into this system.
Accepts "YYYY-MM-DD" or RFC3339. If omitted, the existing value is preserved.

snapshotted_at.description:
SnapshottedAt records when the membership share counts were entered into this system.
If omitted, the existing value is preserved.

x-enum-comments.WarnBenchmarkDataUnavailable: benchmark ticker missing or has no price data; Alpha/Beta set to zero
x-enum-comments.WarnCashSubstituted: pre-IPO period covered with synthetic cash prices; start date unchanged
x-enum-comments.WarnETFSourceIncomplete: source ETF data does not add up to 100%
x-enum-comments.WarnExcessiveForwardFill: too many securities needed forward-filling on some dates; those dates excluded
x-enum-comments.WarnFuzzyMatchSubstituted: dash-inserted ticker used in place of original (e.g. BRKB → BRK-B)
x-enum-comments.WarnMissingPriceHistory: one or more securities have no price history; affected dates excluded
x-enum-comments.WarnPartialETFExpansion: holdings scaled to 100% because resolved weights didn't sum to 1.0
x-enum-comments.WarnProportionalReallocation: pre-IPO period handled by redistributing weight among available members
x-enum-comments.WarnStartDateAdjusted: start date adjusted to security inception date

x-enum-descriptions: holdings scaled to 100% because resolved weights didn't sum to 1.0
source ETF data does not add up to 100%
dash-inserted ticker used in place of original (e.g. BRKB → BRK-B)
one or more securities have no price history; affected dates excluded
too many securities needed forward-filling on some dates; those dates excluded
start date adjusted to security inception date
benchmark ticker missing or has no price data; Alpha/Beta set to zero
pre-IPO period covered with synthetic cash prices; start date unchanged
pre-IPO period handled by redistributing weight among available members
